Identity.Name: StingLigatureRatings
Identity.Definition: Anti-ligature classification per HBN 03-01 / NHS England Mental Health Premises. Carried on every element in a patient-accessible mental-health environment. Drives anti-ligature audit gating, colour-coded view filter pack, and procurement compliance reports.

Governance.StandardsBasis: HBN 03-01:2013 (Adult acute mental health units); NHS England Standards and procurement guidance; PAS 24 / BS 8300-2; PD CR 14383

Value.Definition: Compliant — manufacturer-certified anti-ligature fitting. Passes load test (typically 25 kg pull). Approved for patient-accessible mental health areas.
Non-Compliant — standard fitting, NOT anti-ligature certified. Must be excluded from patient-accessible areas; flagged for removal in retrofit.
Mitigated — non-compliant fitting retained with documented risk mitigation (e.g. behind locked panel, lobby-only access). Requires named clinical risk-acceptance.
Not Applicable — element is in a non-patient-accessible area (staff base, BoH, plant room). Excluded from anti-ligature audit scope.
Under Review — fitting awaiting certification check / pull-test verification. Flagged amber pending evidence.
